◎简　　介  

　　Michael is a total looser, who nobody cares for. When he fails to get a position as guitar player in Lindsay's band and looses his job on the way, he makes a deal with a Voodoo priestess. She promises him the fulfillment of all his dreams if he swears obedience to her. He becomes a rock star and has many women - but to stay alive, he has to kill other people.
introduction: Michael is a total looser, who nobody cares for. When he fails to get a position as guitar player in Lindsay's band and looses his job on the way, he makes a deal with a Voodoo priestess. She promises him the fulfillment of all his dreams if he swears obedience to her. He becomes a rock star and has many women - but to stay alive, he has to kill other people.
